description: Curated artifact toolkit /lib/ manifest (ADR-0089 Addendum A · FRE-527). Single cross-repo lockstep source: the personal_agent_secrets Worker must host exactly these origin + paths, and `make verify-lib` asserts each serves the correct executable/typed MIME + nosniff + reachability under the artifact CSP. Sole writer: the public-repo build session; hosting-determined values (three.js IIFE filename, OFL font files, highlight.js theme) are confirmed by the hosting CC via the FRE-527 ticket, not edited here directly.
